title: Connect Backend to /dashboard/client with Collapsible Cards and Task Management

requirements.summary: Replace all mock data in /dashboard/client with live backend data, implement React Query hooks for layanan and tasks, and add a collapsible Summary Card showing task status counts
acceptanceCriteria: Summary Card is collapsible and shows counts for each task status
Daftar Layanan section fetches real data from getMyLayanan and is collapsible
All task status sections display real data from the backend
No mock or hardcoded data remains in the client dashboard

file_operations.description: Add React Query hooks for fetching client layanan and tasks: useGetMyLayanan (calls getMyLayanan backend method to fetch layanan belonging to the authenticated client), useGetTasksByStatus (calls getTaskByStatus backend method for each status: #review, #revisi, #on_progress, #qa_asistenmu, #selesai). Each hook must use the useActor hook to access the authenticated backend actor and handle loading/error states properly.

Remove all mock/dummy data from the component. Replace with live data fetched via the new React Query hooks (useGetMyLayanan, useGetTasksByStatus). Add a collapsible Summary Card section at the top showing task counts per status (#review, #revisi, #on_progress, #qa_asistenmu, #selesai) using shadcn/ui Collapsible component. Update the Daftar Layanan section to display real layanan data and make it collapsible. Ensure proper loading states and error handling for all backend queries. Verify the authorization component's usage instructions before implementing authentication checks.

requirements.summary: Add a collapsible 'Buat Task' form to /dashboard/client that allows clients to create tasks only when they have at least one active layanan, with validation and backend submission via createTask
acceptanceCriteria: Layanan dropdown only appears when client has more than one active layanan
Form is disabled or hidden if client has no active layanan
Submitting calls createTask on the backend canister with id, tipeLayanan, judulTask, detailTask, deadline, createdAt
Success and error states are shown to the user after submission

file_operations.description: Add a React Query mutation hook useCreateTask that calls the backend createTask method with parameters: tipeLayanan (Text), judulTask (Text), detailTask (Text), deadline (bigint). The mutation must use the authenticated actor from useActor and handle success/error responses. On success, invalidate relevant query keys (myLayanan, tasksByStatus) to refresh the dashboard data.

Add a collapsible 'Buat Task' form section using shadcn/ui Collapsible, Card, Form, Input, Textarea, and Button components. The form should include: a dropdown (Select component) to choose an active layanan (only shown when more than one active layanan exists), a text input for Judul Task, a textarea for Detail Task, a date picker (Calendar/Popover components) for Deadline, and a submit button labeled 'Buat Permintaan ke Asistenmu'. Only enable/show the form when the client has at least one active layanan (derived from useGetMyLayanan). On submit, call the useCreateTask mutation with all required fields, converting the deadline date to a bigint timestamp. Display success/error feedback using toast notifications or inline messages. Verify the authorization component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: Render five separate collapsible task status cards under 'Daftar Task Kamu' section, each listing tasks for that status with individual collapsible task entries showing full details
acceptanceCriteria: Five collapsible status cards are rendered under 'Daftar Task Kamu'
Each card displays only tasks matching its status for the logged-in client
Individual task entries within each card are collapsible showing full task details
Cards reflect live data from the backend

file_operations.description: Add a 'Daftar Task Kamu' section containing five collapsible status cards using shadcn/ui Collapsible and Card components: (1) Meminta Review (#review), (2) Task on Revisi (#revisi), (3) Task on Progress (#on_progress), (4) Task QA Asistenmu (#qa_asistenmu), (5) Task Selesai (#selesai). Each card fetches tasks for its status using the useGetTasksByStatus hook. Within each status card, render individual task entries as nested collapsible items showing: task ID, tipeLayanan, judulTask (summary), and when expanded: detailTask, deadline (formatted date), createdAt (formatted date). Use the Task type from backend.d.ts. Handle empty states (e.g., show 'Tidak ada task' message or use the generated task-empty-state.dim_200x200.png image from frontend/public/assets/generated/task-empty-state.dim_200x200.png when a status has no tasks). Ensure proper loading/error states for each card.

requirements.summary: Add a collapsible 'History' card at the bottom of /dashboard/client displaying recent task-related activity for the client
acceptanceCriteria: History card is collapsible and placed at the bottom of the dashboard
History card lists recent task-related activity for the client
History data is derived from real backend task data

file_operations.description: Add a collapsible 'History' card at the bottom of the dashboard using shadcn/ui Collapsible and Card components. Derive recent activity from the task data already fetched (across all statuses) by mapping tasks to activity entries such as 'Task <judulTask> created on <createdAt>' or 'Task <judulTask> updated to <status>'. Sort entries by timestamp (most recent first) and display the top 10-20 recent items. Each entry should show the activity description and a formatted timestamp. Include an empty state if no activity is available. This card must be placed below all other dashboard sections.
